prs.title: Adds required data fields for strategy
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Adding 82 lines of custom field definitions to a Prisma schema file is a modest data modeling task requiring thoughtful field design but limited complexity.

prs.title: Ch/worker restart
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 419 lines across 9 files touching worker restart logic, BullMQ configuration, queue admin UI, entrypoint, and CI config represents a significant cross-cutting infrastructure feature.

prs.title: Implement required fields validation and UI improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 179 lines across 8 files implementing required field validation logic, a progress hook, filtering UI, and layout adjustments constitutes a solid medium-sized feature with meaningful frontend and utility work.

prs.title: Fix logout error: User not found or not authenticated
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 34 lines across 3 files fixing a logout authentication error is a small, targeted bug fix with limited scope.

prs.title: Next bump
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A single custom line bumping the Next.js version in package.json is a trivial dependency update.

stories.name: Strategy Required Fields: Data Capture & Validation
stories.rationale: Introduced required data fields for strategy at the schema level and enforced them with validation logic and UI feedback, ensuring complete and consistent strategy data entry.

stories.name: Worker Reliability & Background Processing Stability
stories.rationale: Improved platform resilience by enabling worker restart capability, reducing downtime risk for background processing jobs.

stories.name: Fix User Logout Authentication Error
stories.rationale: Resolved a logout error that occurred when a user was not found or authenticated, improving session handling reliability.

stories.name: Framework Version Upgrade
stories.rationale: Bumped the Next.js version to keep the platform up to date with the latest framework improvements and security patches.
